facebook.caption: 4.2 stars. 192 reviews. Right on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo in the heart of Phu Quoc. This beach pulls real numbers from real visitors, not just resort guests who never leave the pool. Soft sand, open water, and easy access from Khu 1. No shuttle bus required. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Shoes off, sand on, ocean in front of you. Phu Quoc Beach at Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is exactly what 192 reviewers gave 4.2 stars for. This is the one you walk to.

instagram.caption: 4.2 stars. 192 reviews. Đường Trần Hưng Đạo beach delivers. No resort wristband needed. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Walk straight to the water. Phu Quoc Beach rated 4.2 stars by 192 real visitors. This one earns it.
